expectations.text: Proposes organizing files by type (documents, images, spreadsheets, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Financial, Images, Documents, Archives plus keyword categories

expectations.text: Suggests a date-based or descriptive naming convention
Provides a script or code to perform the organization
Uses pathlib or shutil for file operations (not raw os.system calls)
Handles edge cases like duplicate filenames
expectations.evidence: Duplicate handling with numbered suffix in organize_downloads
